title: Croatian Polenta Pilaf
description: A hearty and flavorful polenta pilaf, infused with the rich flavors of Croatia. Serve as a main course or side dish.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the minced garlic and sauté for 1-2 minutes until fragrant.
Add the polenta and pilaf, stirring to combine.
Pour in the vegetable broth and bring the mixture to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20-25 minutes.
Stir in the salt and black pepper.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
